commands.name: download
commands.description: Download the schema as GraphQL SDL

options.name: --FileName
options.description: The file name to store the schema SDL.

options.name: --headers
options.description:
Custom headers used in request to Graph QL server. Can be
used multiple times. Example: --headers key1=value1 --headers
key2=value2

options.name: --typeDepth
options.description: The type depth used for the introspection request.

options.name: --scope
options.description:
A custom scope that shall be passed along with the token
request.

options.name: --token
options.description:
The token that shall be used to authenticate with the GraphQL
server.

options.name: --no-scheme
options.description: The token will be send without a scheme.

arguments.name: URI
arguments.description: The URL to the GraphQL endpoint.

options.name: --operationOutputDirectory
options.description:
The output directory for persisted operation
files.

options.name: --relayFormat
options.description:
Export persisted operations in the relay
format.

options.name: --Path
options.description: The directory where the client shall be located.

options.name: --headers
options.description:
Custom headers used in request to Graph QL server. Can be
used multiple times. Example: --headers key1=value1 --headers
key2=value2

options.name: --typeDepth
options.description: The type depth used for the introspection request.

options.name: --scope
options.description:
A custom scope that shall be passed along with the token
request.

options.name: --token
options.description:
The token that shall be used to authenticate with the GraphQL
server.

options.name: --no-scheme
options.description: The token will be send without a scheme.
